en: Annual instruction for autogenous welding, cutting, and related processes must be conducted, aligned to site conditions, manufacturer instructions, and relevant technical information.\nWork Equipment Ordinance, Section 26(4)
Compressed gas cylinders must be secured against tipping and overheating.\nWork Equipment Ordinance, Section 26(2)(6)

Hot work fire prevention measures must address welding, cutting, soldering, and other spark-producing work in fire-prone areas. Hot work controls must prevent ignition of flammable or combustible materials from flames, heat, or welding spatter.\nConstruction Workers Protection Ordinance, Section 42(2), 42(3)
Fire watch provisions must be defined when hot work creates fire risk.\nConstruction Workers Protection Ordinance, Section 42(3)
